creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Mon, Feb 28, 2000 at 03:00:00PM +0900, OKAZAKI Tetsurou wrote:
> Since libggi and libgii twin are installed under ${LOCALBASE},
> 
> .if defined(WANT_GGI)
> LIB_DEPENDS=	ggi.2:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/libggi
> CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-ggi=${LOCALBASE}.
> .endif
> 
> are better to append to the port.

Okay, okay. I didn't test it that well! :-)

I only ran the make with -DWANT_GGI, and it finished. Perhaps I should have
paid more attention to the configure log, but I didn't see anything
particularly bad. Perhaps I should retest with your modification. ;->

*cheeks red now*
-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
